title: Eval
body:
Parsing mathematical expressions since '25
Join our Discord to get help, make suggestions and chat about the mod


Content

Parse mathematical expressions directly in the comfort of your chat:


Eval also allows inline parsing


But you can also store variables for more advanced and easier equations

Variables can be deleted via /eval delvar <var name> and you can show all defined variables through /eval vars.



Configuration

The direct config file is located at config/eval.json and can be hot reloaded via /eval reload Show the current eval config via /eval status The format pattern can be changed via /eval start 'pattern' and /eval end 'pattern' And inlining can be turned on and off via /eval inline on/off
 

Eval is free and will always be free to be used in packs <3
